changeSet.author: p.meyer
changeSet.sql: create table if not exists gmdb.pub ( id bigint generated always as identity not null, pub_date date null, pub_idx_id bigint not null, details jsonb not null default jsonb_build_object('resourceId', gen_random_uuid()), constraint pk_pub primary key (id), constraint fk_pub_pub_idx foreign key (pub_idx_id) references gmdb.pub_idx (id) );
